raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"Logical consistency is central to improving the draft by ensuring the argument chain from premises to conclusions holds without gaps.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is essential for verifying that reported results support the stated claims in the technical draft.","R1.5":"Structural reorganization at the section level can enhance the narrative arc of the draft's technical exposition.","R1.6":"Writing polish is load-bearing for improving the draft's clarity, grammar, and flow at the sentence and paragraph levels.","R1.7":"Citation and scholarship are central to improving the draft by ensuring accurate references and literature coverage.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is central to responsibly improving the research draft by highlighting limitations in findings.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance ensures claims in the improved draft do not exceed the supported evidence.","RX.3":"Scope adherence keeps the improvements focused on the draft's defined technical topic without unwarranted expansions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is important to mitigate potential misuses of the LLM calibration methods described.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability ensure that improvements maintain clear attribution of ideas and results in the draft."}}

rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is central to improving the draft by ensuring the argument chain from premises to conclusions holds without gaps.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is essential for verifying that reported results support the stated claims in the technical draft.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization at the section level can enhance the narrative arc of the draft's technical exposition.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing for improving the draft's clarity, grammar, and flow at the sentence and paragraph levels.
rationale.R1.7: Citation and scholarship are central to improving the draft by ensuring accurate references and literature coverage.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central to responsibly improving the research draft by highlighting limitations in findings.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance ensures claims in the improved draft do not exceed the supported evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence keeps the improvements focused on the draft's defined technical topic without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is important to mitigate potential misuses of the LLM calibration methods described.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability ensure that improvements maintain clear attribution of ideas and results in the draft.
